# VeriLock
> Sign documents together. Lock proof on the Nimiq blockchain. Your file never leaves your device.

## Key Pages
- Home: https://verilock.online/ — Sign, invite co-signers, lock a permanent proof
- Pricing: https://verilock.online/pricing — Free to sign, one-time fee to lock
- Security: https://verilock.online/security — How VeriLock keeps documents private
- Blog: https://verilock.online/blog — Guides, comparisons, and product updates
- Support: https://verilock.online/support — Contact and help
- Privacy: https://verilock.online/privacy — Privacy policy

## What VeriLock Does
1. Fingerprint a document locally — the file never leaves your device.
2. Invite co-signers via a link; they sign with their Nimiq wallet.
3. Lock the final fingerprint on the Nimiq blockchain as a permanent integrity proof.
4. Anyone can verify later by fingerprinting their copy — no wallet required.

## Core Features
- Local document fingerprinting (SHA-256) — files never uploaded to a server.
- Multi-party Nimiq wallet signatures with cryptographic binding.
- On-chain document fingerprint locking via Nimiq blockchain transactions.
- Public verification — drop any file to check if it matches a locked proof.
- Nimiq Pay integration for one-time seal credits (no subscription required).
- Optional ready-to-seal email notifications for signers.
- Offline verifier (open-source): https://github.com/clevertech-os/verilock-offline

## Tech Stack
- TypeScript SPA (Vite + React) for the signing interface
- Node.js/Express backend for session management and Nimiq RPC
- Nimiq blockchain for proof anchoring
- Cloudflare for CDN and DNS
- Railway for hosting
